title: alicosta alpina
intro: Alicosta alpina, also known as Alpine Rose, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alicosta alpina include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and can also be used as a tincture in homeopathic remedies.
